execute.stdout:
hi -> short
hello -> medium
goodmorning -> long
ok -> short

code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut line = ""
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 10
      let len = string.len(line)
      if len > 0
        let cat = if len <= 3
          "short"
        else if len <= 7
          "medium"
        else
          "long"
        end
        println("#{line} -> #{cat}")
      end
      line = ""
    else if b == 13
      ()
    else
      line = "#{line}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
let tail_len = string.len(line)
if tail_len > 0
  let cat = if tail_len <= 3
    "short"
  else if tail_len <= 7
    "medium"
  else
    "long"
  end
  println("#{line} -> #{cat}")
end
